title: Neo Scripts
description: Utility Mod for Lua scripting for Hypixel SkyBlock and other servers
body:
The mod is designed for writing client scripts in Lua, and can help with automation or creating QOL scripts.
# Features
### Commands:
- /lua - Lua API control

## Misc:
- [Lua API](https://neoscripts.qzz.io/wiki/26.1.2), [Forum](https://neoscripts.qzz.io/), [Discord](https://discord.gg/zSefVGvKsW)
